mapper.select: SELECT * FROM score_line ORDER BY year DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score_line (year, politics_line, foreign_lang_line, major_basis_line, total_first_line, admission_total_line) VALUES (#{year}, #{politicsLine}, #{foreignLangLine}, #{majorBasisLine}, #{totalFirstLine}, #{admissionTotalLine})
mapper.update: UPDATE score_line SET year = #{year}, politics_line = #{politicsLine}, foreign_lang_line = #{foreignLangLine}, major_basis_line = #{majorBasisLine}, total_first_line = #{totalFirstLine}, admission_total_line = #{admissionTotalLine} WHERE id = #{id}
